name: mise
description: A tool for managing runtime versions

subcommands.name: activate
subcommands.description: Initializes mise in the current shell session

args.name: SHELL_TYPE
args.description: Shell type to generate the script for

options.name: --shims
options.description: Use shims instead of modifying PATH

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Show extra output (use -vv for even more)

name: -y
--yes
options.description: Answer yes to all confirmation prompts

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: Show an alias for a plugin

subcommands.name: set
subcommands.description: Add/update an alias for a plugin

subcommands.name: unset
subcommands.description: Clears an alias for a plugin

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)
